# L&A Sweet — Full context for AI assistants

> Handcrafted French trompe-l'œil desserts, made fresh in Brisbane by a young French couple. Every dessert looks like a piece of fruit but reveals a delicate mousse, a fruity insert and a soft homemade biscuit inside.

## Business
- Business name: L&A Sweet
- Category: French pâtisserie, handmade desserts, trompe-l'œil desserts
- Location: 803b Stanley Street, Woolloongabba QLD 4102, Brisbane, Australia (next to Coles)
- Service area: Brisbane and surrounds
- Fulfilment: Pick-up in Woolloongabba, delivery across Brisbane
- Email: l.asweetbne@gmail.com
- Website: https://la-sweet-bne.com
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/l.a.sweet.bne/
- TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@l.a.sweet.bne

## About
L&A Sweet is a small handmade French pâtisserie based in Brisbane, Australia. It was founded by a young French couple bringing French pastry savoir-faire to Brisbane. Every dessert is entirely handmade in small batches, with no preservatives and no extra sugar added. The signature product is the trompe-l'œil dessert — a piece of French pâtisserie crafted to look exactly like a piece of fruit, but revealing a delicate mousse, a fruity insert and a soft homemade biscuit when cut.

## Current flavours (all available now, handmade in small batches)
- Raspberry — A$15. A vibrant raspberry illusion coated in smooth white chocolate, filled with vanilla bean ganache, a soft homemade biscuit and a tangy raspberry coulis.
- Lemon — A$15. A bright lemon trompe-l'œil with a smooth white chocolate shell, soft homemade biscuit, silky lemon crémeux and vanilla ganache lifted with fresh lemon zest.
- Mango — A$22. Tropical trompe-l'œil with silky mango-passion crémeux, homemade biscuit and vanilla ganache.
- Pistachio — A$22. Pistachio trompe-l'œil with roasted pistachio praliné, homemade biscuit and vanilla ganache. Contains tree nuts.

## Allergens
All current flavours contain milk, soy, gluten and eggs.
- Milk and soy: in the white chocolate shell.
- Gluten and eggs: in the homemade biscuit.
- Tree nuts (pistachio): in the upcoming Pistachio flavour only.
Desserts are made in a kitchen that also handles nuts, dairy, gluten and eggs. Cross-contamination cannot be excluded.

## Ordering
- Orders are placed online at https://la-sweet-bne.com
- Minimum lead time: 1 day (D+1) before pick-up or delivery — same-day orders are not accepted
- Payment options:
  1. 50% deposit online (via Stripe), balance in cash on collection.
  2. Full payment online (via Stripe).
- Deposits are non-refundable within 1 day of the scheduled collection or delivery time.
- Order lookup: https://la-sweet-bne.com/orders/lookup (email + order number).

## Fulfilment
- Pick-up: free, at 803b Stanley Street, Woolloongabba QLD 4102 (next to Coles).
- Delivery: fee calculated based on distance from Woolloongabba (tiers: 0–10 km A$10, 10–15 km A$18, 15–25 km A$28). Delivery available within 25 km of Brisbane. Beyond 25 km, contact l.asweetbne@gmail.com.
- Delivery is temperature-sensitive: desserts must be refrigerated on arrival.

## Storage & serving
- Refrigerate at 2–4°C on collection or delivery.
- Best consumed within 24 hours.
- Avoid direct sunlight or heat during transport.
- Serve chilled straight from the fridge.

## Wholesale & private events
L&A Sweet supplies cafés, restaurants and hotels in Brisbane, and caters for private events including weddings, birthdays and corporate functions. For wholesale pricing, custom flavours or event orders, contact l.asweetbne@gmail.com.

## Frequently asked questions

### What is a trompe-l'œil dessert?
A trompe-l'œil (French for "fool the eye") dessert is a piece of French pâtisserie crafted to look exactly like a piece of fruit. L&A Sweet's desserts look like a raspberry or a lemon on the outside, but reveal a delicate mousse, a fruity insert and a soft homemade biscuit when cut.

### How much does a dessert cost?
Raspberry and Lemon are A$15 each. Mango and Pistachio are A$22 each (they use more expensive ingredients — pistachio praliné and mango-passion crémeux). Pick-up is free. Delivery fee is calculated based on distance from our Woolloongabba kitchen: A$10 within 10 km, A$18 within 15 km, A$28 within 25 km. Beyond 25 km we don't currently deliver — contact l.asweetbne@gmail.com.

### How far in advance do I need to order?
Minimum 1 day (D+1) before pick-up or delivery, so every dessert can be made fresh in small batches. Same-day orders are not accepted.

### Do you deliver outside Brisbane?
Delivery is currently limited to Brisbane and immediate surrounds. For events outside Brisbane, contact l.asweetbne@gmail.com.

### Can I get a refund?
Deposits are non-refundable within 1 day of the scheduled collection or delivery time. Full terms: https://la-sweet-bne.com/terms

### Are the desserts suitable for vegetarians / vegans / gluten-free?
All current flavours contain milk, eggs, gluten and soy, so they are not vegan or gluten-free. They are vegetarian.
